description: CompositionCotton blend FittingComfort Wash CareHand wash or machine wash Chosen from the adidas fitness and sportswear range for women, this tracksuit comprises a short sleeved hooded top and knee length capris to define your style at the gym. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, this adidas tracksuit allows easy movement and does not lose shape even after years of use.
